#Mapping 

```{r}
# Load packages
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)

# Step 1: Prepare CORN dataset
# Create 5-digit FIPS and compute irrigated_fraction
CORN_summary <- CORN %>%
  group_by(fips) %>%
  summarize(
    irrigated_yield = sum(irr, na.rm = TRUE),
    rainfed_yield = sum(rainfed, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_yield = irrigated_yield + rainfed_yield,
    irrigated_fraction = ifelse(total_yield > 0, irrigated_yield / total_yield, NA_real_)
  )

# Step 2: Get US mainland counties
counties_sf <- counties(cb = TRUE, class = "sf") %>%
  filter(!STATEFP %in% c("02", "15", "72", "78", "60", "66", "69"))  # Remove AK, HI, PR, territories
states_sf <- states(cb = TRUE, class = "sf") %>%
  filter(!STATEFP %in% c("02", "15", "72", "78", "60", "66", "69"))

# Step 3: Join shapefile with CORN data
map_data <- counties_sf %>%
  mutate(fips = GEOID) %>%
  left_join(CORN_summary, by = "fips")

# Step 4: Plot with reversed gradient and state borders
 Irrigated_CORN_map <-ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = map_data, aes(fill = irrigated_fraction), color = NA) +
  geom_sf(data = states_sf, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.3) +  # State outlines
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("red", "gold", "#4cbb17"),  # Reversed: red = low irrigated, green = high
    na.value = "gray90",
    limits = c(0, 1),
    name = "Irrigated Fraction"
  ) +
  labs(title = "Fraction of Irrigated to Rainfed Corn Crops by County") +
  theme_linedraw() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank(),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_sf(datum = NA)  # Removes ocean padding
```

```{r}
  # === 1. Load Required Packages ===
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(tigris)
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)


# === 2. Download Shapefiles Once (Contiguous US Only) ===
mainland_counties <- tigris::counties(cb = TRUE, class = "sf") %>%
  filter(!STATEFP %in% c("02", "15", "72", "78", "60", "66", "69"))  # Exclude AK, HI, PR, territories

mainland_states <- tigris::states(cb = TRUE, class = "sf") %>%
  filter(!STATEFP %in% c("02", "15", "72", "78", "60", "66", "69"))


plot_irrigated_fraction_map <- function(data, crop_name = NULL, counties_sf, states_sf) {
  # Get name of dataset if crop_name is not provided
  if (is.null(crop_name)) {
    crop_name <- deparse(substitute(data))
    crop_name <- tools::toTitleCase(tolower(crop_name))  # e.g., "BARLEY" -> "Barley"
  }

  summary_df <- data %>%
    mutate(fips = sprintf("%02d%03d", state_ansi, county_ansi)) %>%
    group_by(fips) %>%
    summarize(
      irrigated_yield = sum(irr, na.rm = TRUE),
      rainfed_yield = sum(rainfed, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_yield = irrigated_yield + rainfed_yield,
      irrigated_fraction = ifelse(total_yield > 0, irrigated_yield / total_yield, NA_real_)
    )

  map_data <- counties_sf %>%
    mutate(fips = GEOID) %>%
    left_join(summary_df, by = "fips")

  plot <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = map_data, aes(fill = irrigated_fraction), color = NA) +
    geom_sf(data = states_sf, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.3) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colors = c("red", "gold", "#4cbb17"),
      na.value = "gray80",
      limits = c(0, 1),
      name = "Irrigated Fraction"
    ) +
    labs(title = paste("Fraction of Irrigated", crop_name, "Yield by County")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      panel.grid = element_blank()
    ) +
    coord_sf(datum = NA)
return(plot)
}


```


```{r}
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(CORN, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(BARLEY, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(SORGHUM, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(SOYBEANS, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(PEANUTS, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(OATS, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(COTTON, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(WHEAT, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(BEANS, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_irrigated_fraction_map(HAY, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)


```
```{r}
# mapping years of crop present rather than irrigation factor 

plot_crop_presence_years_map <- function(data, crop_name = NULL, counties_sf, states_sf) {
  # Get name of dataset if crop_name is not provided
  if (is.null(crop_name)) {
    crop_name <- deparse(substitute(data))
    crop_name <- tools::toTitleCase(tolower(crop_name))  # e.g., "barley_data" -> "Barley"
  }

  # Prepare summary: count number of unique years crop is present per county
  summary_df <- data %>%
    mutate(fips = sprintf("%02d%03d", state_ansi, county_ansi)) %>%
    group_by(fips) %>%
    summarize(
      years_present = n_distinct(year[!is.na(irr) | !is.na(rainfed)])
    )

  # Merge with shapefile
  map_data <- counties_sf %>%
    mutate(fips = GEOID) %>%
    left_join(summary_df, by = "fips")

  # Plot map
  plot <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = map_data, aes(fill = years_present), color = NA) +
    geom_sf(data = states_sf, fill = NA, color = "black", size = 0.3) +
    scale_fill_viridis_c(
      option = "viridis",
      direction = -1,
      na.value = "gray90",
      name = "Years Documented"
    ) +
    labs(title = paste("Number of Years", crop_name, "Was Documented by County")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      panel.grid = element_blank()
    ) +
    coord_sf(datum = NA)

  return(plot)
}

```


```{r}


plot_crop_presence_years_map(CORN, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(BARLEY, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(SORGHUM, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(SOYBEANS, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(PEANUTS, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(OATS, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(COTTON, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(WHEAT, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(BEANS, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)
plot_crop_presence_years_map(HAY, counties_sf = mainland_counties, states_sf = mainland_states)

```
